title: shebet #7626
definition:
1) rod, staff, branch, offshoot, club, sceptre, tribe
    1a) rod, staff
    1b) shaft (of spear, dart)
    1c) club (of shepherd's implement)
    1d) truncheon, sceptre (mark of authority)
    1e) clan, tribe
